sphere_commentary.overview:
The data suggests distinct efficacy profiles across HEALING, THRIVING, and TRANSFORMING series, with HEALING protocols showing strong consistency (mean=6.98, std=1.77), THRIVING protocols achieving higher means (mean=6.96, std=1.72) particularly in cognitive tasks, and TRANSFORMING protocols exhibiting higher variability (mean=6.59, std=1.87) as designed. YouTube reach remains limited but signals potential undiscovered efficacy in protocols like H-OS-L1. AutoGluon underscores the importance of duration and Hz parameters in outcome prediction. Confidence tiers reflect reliable signals for n≥30 protocols, with early data noted for smaller samples.
• HEALING leads in consistency across DESCENT protocols.
• THRIVING shows highest efficacy in Focus & Clarity (mean=7.63, T-FC-L3).
• TRANSFORMING’s variability aligns with ascending-arc intent but flags subgroup effects.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
The three series fulfill their design objectives with clear differentiation in outcome patterns.
• HEALING protocols (e.g., H-OS-L1) maintain stable outcomes across volumes, emphasizing nervous system regulation.
• THRIVING protocols (e.g., T-FC-L3) excel in cognitive domains, with HOLD strategies requiring optimization for effectiveness.
• TRANSFORMING protocols (e.g., X-MD-L1) demonstrate expected variability, with motivational arcs showing potential despite lower retention.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Notable anomalies highlight protocol refinement opportunities and subgroup investigation needs.
• T-FC-L3 (n=35, mean=7.63) exhibits bimodal distribution, suggesting subgroup effects [CONVERGENT].
• H-OS-L1 (n=95, mean=7.15) signals strong efficacy with limited YouTube reach (views=30) [SINGLE SOURCE].
• X-MD-L3 (sim=0.507 drift) indicates evolving response patterns requiring monitoring [SINGLE SOURCE].
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Key development actions address subgroup effects, reach gaps, and design refinement.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Test T-FC-L3’s subgroup response by creating an L2 variant (n=35).
• Increase H-OS-L1’s YouTube promotion to leverage its strong efficacy (mean=7.15, views=30).
• Adjust X-MD-L3’s ascent phase to stabilize outcomes [SINGLE SOURCE].
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding analysis reveals analytical shifts and protocol groupings.
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: Notable in X-MD-L3 (sim=0.507) and H-SL-L1 (sim=0.530) suggests evolving interpretations.
• CROSS-PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: High similarity between T-FC-L1 and T-FC-L2 (sim=0.878) aligns cognitive focus clustering.
• Confidence note: Limited run history — drift analysis provisional.
